# MODURA Modular Construction — AI Index

## Core Pages
- https://ems-prefab.com/ — Homepage: Premium modular construction for apartments, hotels, and offices
- https://ems-prefab.com/about/ — About MODURA: company history, team, values
- https://ems-prefab.com/process/ — Construction process: design, factory production, site assembly
- https://ems-prefab.com/factory/ — Factory tour: 4 factories, 14-station assembly line, certifications
- https://ems-prefab.com/quality/ — Quality control: 147-point inspection, ISO 9001/14001/45001, EN 1090
- https://ems-prefab.com/contact/ — Contact & inquiry form
- https://ems-prefab.com/quote/ — Quick quote request form

## Products
- https://ems-prefab.com/apartments/ — Modular apartment buildings
- https://ems-prefab.com/hotels/ — Modular hotel construction
- https://ems-prefab.com/offices/ — Modular office buildings

## Capabilities
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/ — Capabilities overview hub
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/systems/ — Building systems overview (volumetric, panelized, hybrid)
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/systems/volumetric/ — Volumetric 3D modular systems
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/systems/panelized/ — Panelized 2D flat-pack systems
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/systems/hybrid/ — Hybrid modular systems
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/engineering/ — Engineering capabilities overview
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/engineering/structural/ — Structural engineering (Eurocodes, BIM LOD 400)
- https://ems-prefab.com/capabilities/engineering/sustainability/ — Sustainable design (LEED, BREEAM, embodied carbon)

## Industries
- https://ems-prefab.com/industries/ — Industry solutions hub
- https://ems-prefab.com/industries/healthcare/ — Healthcare modular construction (HTM/HBN compliance)
- https://ems-prefab.com/industries/education/ — Education modular buildings (BB 103/101 compliance)
- https://ems-prefab.com/industries/senior-living/ — Senior living modular facilities (BS 8300 accessible)
- https://ems-prefab.com/industries/military-emergency/ — Military & emergency modular (STANAG 4569, IP65)

- https://ems-prefab.com/how-it-works/ — 7-step project journey with timeline

- https://ems-prefab.com/faq/ — Frequently asked questions (17 Q&A in 4 categories)
